source_quote: Table 4: Any adverse event Group A (n=100): 4, Group B (n=100): 7, Group C (n=100): 4, Group D (n=99): 9, P=0.353. Leflunomide groups (C+D): 4+9=13/199, No leflunomide (A+B): 4+7=11/200
Table 4: Hyperkalemia Group A (n=100): 1, Group B (n=100): 2, Group C (n=100): 1, Group D (n=99): 0, P=0.571. Leflunomide groups (C+D): 1+0=1/199, No leflunomide (A+B): 1+2=3/200

Three patients died during the study: two in the valsartan a.m. group and one in the valsartan p.m. group. None of the fatalities was considered to be related to the study drug. Valsartan a.m. n=365, valsartan p.m. n=370, lisinopril n=356.
There were a total of 34 SAEs, with 11 (3.3%) in the valsartan a.m., 13 (3.5%) in the valsartan p.m. and 10 (2.8%) in the lisinopril groups. Valsartan combined: 11+13=24/735, lisinopril: 10/356.

The overall incidence of adverse events was comparable among the valsartan a.m. (40.5%), valsartan p.m. (38.1%) and lisinopril (41.3%) groups. Table 4: valsartan a.m. 148/365 (40.5%), valsartan p.m. 141/370 (38.1%), lisinopril 147/356 (41.3%). Valsartan combined: 148+141=289/735.

outcome: 24-hour mean systolic blood pressure (SBP) change by ambulatory blood pressure monitoring (ABPM) (mmHg)
source_quote: Treatment with Innopran XL resulted in significant decreases in mean 24-hour SBP (-9.0+/-12.2 mm Hg; p<0.0001)... Similarly, treatment with Inderal LA resulted in significant decreases in mean SBP (-10.4+/-11.7 mm Hg; p<0.0001). There were no significant differences between the treatments for either SBP or DBP.

outcome: 24-hour mean diastolic blood pressure (DBP) change by ABPM (mmHg)
source_quote: Treatment with Innopran XL resulted in significant decreases in... DBP (-6.6+/-8.4 mm Hg; p<0.0001)... treatment with Inderal LA resulted in significant decreases in... mean DBP (-7.7+/-7.7 mm Hg; p<0.0001). There were no significant differences between the treatments.

Treatment with Innopran XL resulted in significant decreases in mean 24-hour SBP (-9.0+/-12.2 mm Hg; p<0.0001)... Similarly, treatment with Inderal LA resulted in significant decreases in mean SBP (-10.4+/-11.7 mm Hg; p<0.0001). N=41 ITT crossover design.
